name: Set of 2 Bombelli Modern Dining Chair Black - Threshold™: Rounded Backrest, Rubberwood Frame, 250lb Capacity
description:
Update your dining room in sleek, minimalist style with this Set of Two Bombelli Modern Dining Chairs from Threshold™. These black wooden dining chairs feature an open-back design with a rounded backrest for a touch of modern flair, and the contoured wooden seats provide a comfortable surface and add extra visual interest. Sturdy wooden construction makes these chairs stable and strong, and the stylish, understated design mixes easily with a variety of decor. Pair them with matching pieces for a cohesive look, or mix it up for an eclectic, curated feel.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.

Depth at seat: 17 .32 inches.
Overall Width: 18 inches.
Overall Height: 32.25 inches.
Overall Depth: 22.35 inches.
Height from seat to floor: 18 inches.
Back rest width : 4.75 inches
